title: Buttery Air-Fried Steak Shreds
description: A quick-fix British dish featuring juicy and buttery shredded steak that's perfect for a keto-friendly meal.
instructions: In a small mixing bowl, whisk together heavy whipping cream and any optional cocoa powder until well combined.
Season the ribeye steak with salt and black pepper if using. Place the steak in the prepared cream mixture, ensuring all slices are evenly coated.
Air fry for 15-20 minutes or until steaks reach an internal temperature of 135°F (57°C).
Remove from air fryer and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot with a side of your favorite keto-friendly condiments if desired.
